recipe.name: Procedure for Mixing Mortars
recipe.description: Standard mortar mixing procedure per ASTM C305 — mix cement, water, and sand with timed steps at controlled speeds.

steps.label: Mix at slow speed
steps.notes: Place all the mixing water in the bowl. Add the cement to the water; then start the mixer and mix at the slow speed (140 ± 5 r/min) for 30 s.

steps.label: Add sand while mixing
steps.notes: Add the entire quantity of sand slowly over a 30-s period, while mixing at slow speed.

steps.label: Mix at medium speed
steps.notes: Stop the mixer, change to medium speed (285 ± 10 r/min), and mix for 30 s.

steps.label: Let mortar stand
steps.notes: Stop the mixer and let the mortar stand for 90 s. During the first 15 s of this interval, quickly scrape down into the batch any mortar that may have collected on the side of the bowl; then for the remainder of this interval, close the mixer enclosure or cover the bowl with the lid.

steps.label: Finish mixing at medium speed
steps.notes: Finish by mixing for 60 s at medium speed (285 ± 10 r/min).
